instruction:
Create a proper install endpoint for NodeWatch.

The install script exists at `shared/results/node-watch-agent/install.sh`. I need to deploy it so users can run:
`curl -sSL http://37.27.189.23:9080/install/nodewatch.sh | bash`

Tasks:
1. Read the install script from `shared/results/node-watch-agent/install.sh`
2. Deploy it at the webserver so it's accessible at `/install/nodewatch.sh`
3. Ensure it has proper MIME type (text/plain) and executable permissions
4. The script already embeds monitor.py, so no separate deployment needed
5. Test that the URL is accessible

The script should work as a one-liner installer that users can curl and pipe to bash.
